supersedes.reason: Re-anchor after a docstring-only edit to entroly/compression_retrieval_store.py (competitor naming removed from source comments) changed the canonical implementation hash the v3 artifact pins. Store/retrieve behavior is unchanged. On this clean re-run both systems satisfy the recovery-integrity gate, so the result is reported as parity: the prior run's single competitor failure was a transient store lock, not a capability gap, and cannot be cherry-picked into a leadership claim. Preserve the immutable v3 protocol and result.

recovery_resilience.latency_policy: Report per-system p50 and p95 store/retrieve latency descriptively; correctness gates cannot be traded for speed.
recovery_resilience.development_policy: Development results may guide implementation and remain visible but cannot support a public leadership claim.
recovery_resilience.holdout_policy: Run once after the docstring-only source cleanup to re-anchor the implementation hash. Establishes current implementation integrity; both systems passing means parity, not leadership.
